title: 2026 Summer Raised Bed Plan - Seed Only
assumptions: User location assumed to be central Maryland / Mid-Atlantic USDA zone 7 as of April 25, 2026.
Plan assumes seeds only, no transplants.
Warm-season direct seeding is assumed to begin after the main frost risk and once soil is warm enough, roughly May 8-20, 2026.
Tomatoes, peppers, eggplant, and sweet potatoes are dropped from the main 2026 summer plan because they are poor bets from seed only at this timing.
Only the first 10 feet of the 6x30 bed is used for vegetables this summer; the remaining 20 feet stays in buckwheat recovery cover.
Each plotted square represents 2 in x 2 in, and crop blocks show productive crop zones rather than isolated plant-center spacing.

beds.name: Bed 1
beds.notes: Best direct-seeded nucleus bed: cucumbers on a north trellis, with the rest of the bed used intentionally rather than left visually empty.

phases.name: May-July
phases.notes: North cucumber zone, middle bush-bean companion zone, and south herb zone. Notes carry the actual sowing density.

placements.label: Cucumber
placements.notes: North trellis zone. Actual sowing target: 8 cucumber plants at about 12-inch spacing. Direct-sow around May 10-20 and cover until flowering if practical.

placements.label: Bush Bean
placements.notes: Secondary direct-sown bean zone in front of the cucumbers. Use one or two bush-bean rows or a narrow band, not a solid carpet.

placements.label: Dill/Cil
placements.notes: Edge herb/insectary zone. Let some dill or cilantro flower.

placements.label: Basil
placements.notes: Direct-sown basil strip after frost. Thin and harvest repeatedly rather than letting it become woody.

placements.label: Dill/Cil
placements.notes: Second herb/insectary zone at the opposite end.

beds.name: Bed 2
beds.notes: Pole-bean nucleus bed with most of the bed claimed by the trellis crop rather than left visually empty.

phases.name: May-July
phases.notes: Pole beans occupy the main bed volume; herbs stay in the edge band.

placements.label: Pole Bean
placements.notes: North side of central or A-frame trellis. Actual target: about 12 pole-bean plants at roughly 8-inch spacing.

placements.label: Pole Bean
placements.notes: South side of central or A-frame trellis. Actual target: about 12 pole-bean plants at roughly 8-inch spacing.

beds.name: Bed 3
beds.notes: Only the first 10 feet is used for bush beans in a clearly claimed productive zone; the rest stays in recovery cover.

phases.name: May-Summer
phases.notes: Front section is a capped bush-bean zone with small herb support at the front edge. The remaining 20 feet stays in buckwheat recovery cover.

placements.label: Dill/Cil
placements.notes: Airy support patch at the productive front edge.

placements.label: Basil
placements.notes: Optional direct-sown basil if desired; otherwise treat as an open herb strip.

placements.label: Bush Bean
placements.notes: Capped productive bush-bean zone in the first 10 feet. Actual target: 2 rows totaling about 60 plants at roughly 4-inch spacing, with a second sowing 2-3 weeks later if desired.

placements.label: Buckwheat
placements.notes: Recovery cover on the remaining 20 feet; mow before seed set to avoid volunteer problems.
